name: project-docs-mcp
description: Project documentation management MCP server - shared data layer for prd-generator, technical-planner, and project-manager skills

tools.name: list_documents
tools.description: List all project documentation files, optionally filtered by directory

tools.name: read_document
tools.description: Read a documentation file by relative path within docs/

tools.name: write_document
tools.description: Create or overwrite a documentation file (PRDs, plans, etc.)

tools.name: update_document_section
tools.description: Update a specific section of a doc by heading match

tools.name: query_features
tools.description: Search the feature roadmap by keyword, classification, or group

tools.name: get_project_context
tools.description: Get project state summary: docs, kanban, skills inventory

tools.name: get_prd_template
tools.description: Get the standard PRD template structure

tools.name: get_plan_template
tools.description: Get the standard technical implementation plan template
